scope.target: ENF-001 semantic governance enforcement, published-path disposition, and dedicated PR CI
constraints: Separate governance CI from package candidate ownership
No path removal without migration/downstream evidence
Consume REL validators without owning release mechanics

steps: Create and validate the v0.5 path-disposition artifact
Add governance PR workflow and path filters
Exercise foundation and REL validation commands
execution.last_completed_step: Completed ENF-001 at 83a0c1c: affected package upgrade cases 16 and 17 pass, Windows Git Bash and hosted Ubuntu run 29770661564 pass 28/28, dedicated governance run 29770662383 passes, and package-candidate run 29770662983 fails closed only because REL-001 has not yet created a v0.5.0 release record.
execution.next_action: Activate V050-008 to implement the machine-readable receiving checkpoint and provider-compatible attribution evidence union without inventing unavailable provider fixtures.

results.summary: Semantic wrapper enforcement, evidence-bound published-path disposition, portable source-governance routing, and dedicated read-only PR CI are complete.
tests_run: source-governance registry and actual v0.5.0 disposition validator
results.residual_risk: Deprecated paths remain compatibility contracts; any later relocation or removal still requires independent downstream evidence. macOS remains unverified.
